description: Skye (Daisy) wakes up in bed, surprised to find Grant Ward beside her in this unfamiliar world. Confused by her lost powers and her apparent relationship with Ward, Skye tries to orient herself while Ward acts as though everything is normal. The two prepare to go to work at Hydra, Skye masking her confusion and anxiety as she follows Ward through their morning routine.
location: Framework (virtual reality simulation / Dr. Radcliffe / Aida construct)

transcript.line: What? That a thing we do now? Tell me it means you're making the coffee.
Ward. It's, uh... Sorry. You j... You startled me.
It's not like I snuck in here. So, what's up?
We got called in to work.
Okay. I'll get dressed. Weirdo. You know we've spent more nights out tracking Inhumans than we've had at home? Bosses can't give us a morning off?
Bosses. Mm. Who do you think's running the brief?
Well, I don't know. You got the text. We should go there again. That was a fun trip. So, what'd they say? Skye, who texted? Skye.
Someone who knew you'd sleep in.
Pinsky. Probably another intake briefing. Don't forget this.

A kid arrested this morning, an Inhuman, of course, was grabbed feet from a public market. Just imagine what he was planning. And I have it on good authority that someone was hiding this Inhuman. I hope this subversive was strung up for treason. Unbelievable.
You're quiet. Are we okay? Or what?
Yeah, yeah, I'm fine. I just, um... Oh, my God.
